generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorInside1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature inside the incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmittedInside1
]

instance TemperatureSensorInside2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature inside the incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmittedInside2
]

instance TemperatureSensorOutside : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external temperature outside the incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmittedOutside
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmittedInside1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorInside1
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmittedInside2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorInside2
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmittedOutside : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorOutside
]

instance TemperatureDataInside1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature reading from inside the incubator box (Sensor 1)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmittedInside1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, PythonRuntime
]

instance TemperatureDataInside2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature reading from inside the incubator box (Sensor 2)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmittedInside2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, PythonRuntime
]

instance TemperatureDataOutside : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature reading from outside the incubator box"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmittedOutside
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, PythonRuntime
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214 × 214 × 3 mm heatbed actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for 4A current control"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Airflow fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow rate controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB"
]

instance IncubatorContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling GPIO interactions with PCB and sensors"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control and signal decoupling"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit providing necessary electrical power to the incubator system"
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitating real-time temperature data transmission from physical sensors to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance PythonRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime environment for thermal prediction and system control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model with two parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntime
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model with four parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntime
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for model parameter optimization via non-linear least squares"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight, ModelParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using calibrated Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services detecting safety violations and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalOptimizationInsight, SafetyAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters based on experimental sensor data"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values for incubator system based on thermal models"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature exceeding safe thresholds in incubator system"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status for optimizing incubator performance"
]

instance ModelParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of model parameters based on calibration results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic shutdown of heatbed or fan in case of safety violation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains IncubatorContainer, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorInside1, TemperatureSensorInside2, TemperatureSensorOutside, RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan are transmitted from the controller to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ, which then activates MOSFETs to regulate hardware actuators based on digital twin decisions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server hosted on Raspberry Pi, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models; data flows from physical sensors to RabbitMQ, processed by DT components for monitoring, calibration, and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated for superior thermal inertia prediction through experimental comparison; uniform temperature tests confirmed sensor placement and fan speed impact on temperature distribution, with maximum discrepancy of 6°C at 18V fan voltage."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for communication between physical twin components and digital twin, with RabbitMQ server running on Raspberry Pi for message brokering."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosts RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models for all digital twin components."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety during operation, ensuring controlled actuation of heatbed and fan to prevent hazardous conditions."
]
